name: BulkDocs
tagline: Document collaboration. Real-time editing, comments, version history, templates. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><linearGradient id="doc-page" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f0ece0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="doc-fold" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ddd"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#bbb"/></linearGradient></defs><ellipse cx="50" cy="92" rx="28" ry="4" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.15)"/><rect x="22" y="10" width="56" height="76" rx="2" fill="#e8e4d8" stroke="#bbb" stroke-width=".5" transform="rotate(2 50 48)"/><rect x="20" y="8" width="56" height="76" rx="2" fill="url(#doc-page)" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width=".8"/><polygon points="76,8 76,22 62,8" fill="url(#doc-fold)" stroke="#bbb" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="28" y="20" width="36" height="2.5" rx="1" fill="#333" opacity=".7"/><rect x="28" y="28" width="40" height="2" rx="1" fill="#888" opacity=".4"/><rect x="28" y="34" width="38" height="2" rx="1" fill="#888" opacity=".4"/><rect x="28" y="40" width="32" height="2" rx="1" fill="#888" opacity=".4"/><rect x="28" y="48" width="40" height="2" rx="1" fill="#888" opacity=".4"/><rect x="28" y="54" width="36" height="2" rx="1" fill="#888" opacity=".4"/><rect x="28" y="60" width="28" height="2" rx="1" fill="#888" opacity=".4"/></svg>

features.title: Real-time Collaboration
features.desc: Multiple people editing the same document simultaneously. See cursors, selections, and changes in real time. No conflicts.

features.title: Version History
features.desc: Every change is saved automatically. Browse previous versions, compare changes, and restore any point in time with one click.

features.title: Comments & Mentions
features.desc: Leave comments on any text. @mention teammates for review. Resolve threads when feedback is addressed. Comment history preserved.

features.title: Templates
features.desc: Pre-built templates for meeting notes, project briefs, SOPs, wikis, and more. Create custom templates for your team's workflows.

features.title: Nested Pages
features.desc: Wiki-style page hierarchy. Nest pages inside pages for organized knowledge bases. Drag and drop to reorganize anytime.

features.title: Export Anywhere
features.desc: Export to PDF, Markdown, HTML, or plain text. Import from Notion, Google Docs, or Markdown files. Your data is never locked in.

useCases.title: Knowledge Teams
useCases.desc: Build internal wikis, SOPs, and documentation. Nested pages keep everything organized. Search finds anything instantly.

useCases.title: Remote Teams
useCases.desc: Collaborative documents that replace scattered Google Docs. Meeting notes, project specs, and decisions all in one place.

useCases.title: Content Creators
useCases.desc: Draft, review, and publish content with version history. Templates speed up recurring content types. Export to any format.
